title: Alone
content:
In contact, lo! the flint and steel,
By sharp and flame, the thought reveal
That he the metal, she the stone,
Had cherished secretly alone. 

Booley Fito.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Ambrose Bierce delivers a powerful performance in "Alone"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
